Failed at the grpc@1.10.1 Install Script
While working on Node.js + Firebase recently I ran into a few weird issues. Here's a note...
The keywords that show up in the error look like this:

node-pre-gyp ERR!
gyp ERR! stack Error: Can't find Python executable "python", you can set the PYTHON env variable.
node-pre-gypgyp  ERR!ERR!  build errorSystem
 Windows_NT 10.0.17763
npm ERR! grpc@1.10.1 install: `node-pre-gyp install --fallback-to-build --library=static_library`
npm ERR! Exit status 1
npm ERR!
npm ERR! Failed at the grpc@1.10.1 install script.
npm ERR! This is probably not a problem with npm. There is likely additional logging output above.
gyp ERR! stack Error: Can't find Python executable "python", you can set the PYTHON env variable.
npm ERR! Failed at the grpc@1.10.1 install script.
npm ERR! This is probably not a problem with npm. There is likely additional logging output above.
Someone on a GitHub issue had the same
npm ERR! Failed at the grpc@1.10.1 install script.
Digging into it later, the root cause is that Firebase v4.5.0's dependency
is only compatible with specific Node.js versions. So just upgrade Firebase past 4.5.0 and it resolves.
